title: Phase A: local calibration documentation alignment
outOfScope: 特定プロジェクト向け preset や sej_ios 固有名称

sources.reason: Phase A scope, acceptance, and developer instructions.
Official adoption and calibration flow to extend.
Installed adoption checklist to align with local calibration model.
Swift preset is SPM-oriented; documentation must clarify scope.
Hosted verification footnote for Swift mobile-stack-quality.
mobile-stack-quality uses minimal SPM fixture only.

problemStatement: Legacy Native iOS adoption showed that AI Cockpit fits a generic template plus local calibration model, not install-and-go. Phase A reduces misunderstanding by documenting Swift verified scope, local calibration checklist, generic stack guidance, and staged CI without adding project-specific presets.

riskAssessment.reason: Documentation-only changes; no runtime or doctor behavior changes.

executionDecision.reason: Phase A file scope, sources, acceptance, and verification are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm Swift verified footnote does not overstate Xcode or CocoaPods coverage.
Confirm no project-specific identifiers appear in template docs.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Document alignment across multiple entry points requires checkpoint review.

acceptance: Swift stack scope documents SPM as the preset default and requires Project Calibration for Xcode, workspace, or CocoaPods layouts.
README hosted verification footnote states mobile-stack-quality Swift coverage is a minimal SPM fixture, not Xcode or CocoaPods validation.
installation.md and adoption docs include a local calibration checklist with adopt then configure Work Items, staged L1/L2 CI, and initial Coverage reportOnly guidance.
installation.md recommends STACK=generic when stack presets are misleading for the target repository.
installation.md includes a GitLab CI snippet with GIT_DEPTH: 0 and check-ai-pr; ai-cockpit-quality remains optional at L1.
examples/swift/README.md clarifies SPM scope and points to Project Calibration for non-SPM layouts.
templates/stacks/swift.mk comments state SPM default and calibration requirement for Xcode or CocoaPods.
guidelines: Documentation body is English for installation and adoption entry points unless editing adoption.ja.md Japanese body.
adoption.ja.md body remains Japanese with YAML front matter author: Ray.
Do not embed project-specific identifiers such as sej_ios in template documentation.
Do not change installation flow stage numbering.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Phase A explicitly scopes adoption.md and adoption.ja.md for local calibration checklist alignment per docs/plans/local-calibration-template-improvements.md.

rollbackNote: Revert Phase A documentation edits and archive this Work Item.
